channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — June 16, 2026
item.description: What you have given specialness has left you bankrupt, and your treasure house barren and empty, with an open door inviting everything that would disturb your peace to enter and destroy. Long ago we said consider not the means by which salvation is attained, nor how to reach it. But DO consider, and consider well, whether it is your wish that you might see your brother sinless. To specialness the

item.title: Lesson 53: Today we will review the following:
item.description: Today we will review the following: [11] “My meaningless thoughts are showing me a meaningless world.” Since the thoughts of which I am aware do not mean anything, the world which pictures them can have no meaning.What is producing this world is insane, and so is what it produces. Reality is not insane, and I have real thoughts as well as insane ones. I can therefore see a real world, if I look to
